# Techy News

AI-Powered Tech News Ecosystem built with Laravel + React + Gemini.

## Main Endpoints
- Homepage: https://techynews.lat/
- Archive: https://techynews.lat/archive
- About: https://techynews.lat/about
- Sitemap: https://techynews.lat/sitemap.xml
- RSS Feed: https://techynews.lat/feed

## Content
All articles on this site are synthesized from multiple tech sources and summarized using AI models (Gemini 2.0 Flash). We focus on high-performance architecture, RAG systems, and modern web development trends.

## Technical Details
This platform explores the intersection of Journalism and AI. It features:
- Real-time LLM-powered news generation.
- RAG Copilot for querying site context.
- High-fidelity UI with dark mode and glassmorphism.
